Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 4}You can swing your sword by pressing {f 1 3 111} while exploring to slash an enemy. Doing so will start combat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Striking an enemy from behind will trigger a {f 0 1 2}Chance Encounter{f 0 1 27}, where {f 0 1 2}you have the advantage{f 0 1 27} at the start of combat. If the enemy attacks you first, a {f 0 1 2}Pinch Encounter{f 0 1 27} will occur, {f 0 1 2}placing you at a disadvantage{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Get into the habit of initiating Chance Encounters to gain the upper hand for an easy victory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can still swing your sword even when there are no enemies present, so you'll be able to practice and test your sword's range.[n]{f 1 1}
